  • Method Details

    • taxYear

      public TransferScheduleSummaryRetirementContribution.Builder taxYear(int taxYear)
      An explicit tax year value. The current year is always valid; and the prior year is valid only before the tax deadline. Must be in "YYYY" format.

    • taxYear

      public TransferScheduleSummaryRetirementContribution.Builder taxYear(Optional<Integer> taxYear)
      An explicit tax year value. The current year is always valid; and the prior year is valid only before the tax deadline. Must be in "YYYY" format.

    • temporalTaxYear

      public TransferScheduleSummaryRetirementContribution.Builder temporalTaxYear(TransferScheduleSummaryTemporalTaxYear temporalTaxYear)
      A temporal tax year value. This will always evaluate to a year based on the date the transfer was initiated.

    • temporalTaxYear

      public TransferScheduleSummaryRetirementContribution.Builder temporalTaxYear(Optional<? extends TransferScheduleSummaryTemporalTaxYear> temporalTaxYear)
      A temporal tax year value. This will always evaluate to a year based on the date the transfer was initiated.

    • type

      public TransferScheduleSummaryRetirementContribution.Builder type(TransferScheduleSummaryType type)
      The type of retirement contribution.

    • type

      public TransferScheduleSummaryRetirementContribution.Builder type(Optional<? extends TransferScheduleSummaryType> type)
      The type of retirement contribution.

    • build

      public TransferScheduleSummaryRetirementContribution build()
